items.title: CVE-2024-12345: Critical OpenSSL RCE
items.summary: A critical buffer overflow vulnerability (CVE-2024-12345) in OpenSSL 3.x enables remote code execution through a malformed TLS certificate chain, carrying a CVSS score of 9.8. All versions prior to 3.2.1 are affected. Immediate patching to version 3.2.1 or later is strongly recommended.
